title: passiflora moluccana var. teysmanniana
intro: Passiflora moluccana var. teysmanniana, also known as the Yellow Granadilla or Yellow Passion Flower, is a tropical vine native to the islands of the Pacific Ocean. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Passiflora moluccana var. teysmanniana include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
